pi_items.source: Chinook schema analysis - these tables are not required for Brazil customer invoice extraction

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, public sample database from GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database, v1.4.5+), not synthetic. It contains 11 tables total; the task requires 9 tables for a Brazil customer subset. Brazil data is verified to exist with: 5 customers, 35 invoices, 190 invoice line items, 190 unique tracks, 89 albums, 60 artists, 13 genres, 3 media types, and 3 support employees. All metadata paths and table names are accurate.
